title: wacrg capture
description: Schema for a single corpus intake capture under corpus/captures/<id>.yaml. Captures are synthetic and sanitized only.

id.description: Stable identifier for the capture, e.g. issue-12 or example-sanitized-offer.

status.description: Lifecycle status of the capture record.

source.description: Where the capture came from and how it was obtained.

technique.description: Reverse-engineering technique used to obtain this capture. Must be one of the fixed technique ids.

issue.description: Optional GitHub issue number that produced this capture.

contributor.description: Optional GitHub handle of the contributor.

captured_at.description: Optional ISO date string for when the capture was taken.

stanza_tag.description: The top-level WABinary node tag the capture concerns, e.g. call.

direction.description: Direction of the stanza relative to the capturing device.

confidence.description: How much trust the contributor places in this decode.

raw.description: The raw captured payload in a transport-faithful form.

body.description: The raw payload. Must be sanitized of all PII and secrets.

decoded.description: Human-readable decode / annotation of the raw payload.

attributes.description: Optional flat list of notable attributes extracted from the capture.

notes.description: Free-text notes, caveats, and open questions.

sanitized.description: MUST be true. Asserts the capture contains no real PII or secrets.
